Then find all visitor centers in Great Smoky Mountains, and check the current weather alerts for Great Smoky Mountains park. Finally, search Google Maps for campgrounds near 'Shenandoah National Park, Virginia' and get the place details for the first result that matches the campground name you remembered from the Shenandoah search. Report: (1) the exact name of the Shenandoah campground containing 'Big', (2) how many visitor centers Great Smoky Mountains has, (3) whether there are any active weather alerts for Great Smoky Mountains, and (4) the Google Maps rating of the matching Shenandoah campground place.
